rules.current_observed_value: GLD 20 shares around 396.110; recovered above 395 but below 400-405 full repair zone
rules.trigger_condition: If GLD loses 395 again or breaks 392, reduce 5 GLD immediately. If weakness continues, reduce another 5 GLD.
rules.intended_action: keep active risk monitoring; accept current non-execution after recovery above 395
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: broker executable quote and order-detail screenshot required for any reduction
rules.rule_drift_prevention: Do not retire the GLD rule until 400-405 recovery; do not relink the rule to closed UGL.

rules.current_observed_value: NVDA 20 shares around 207.650; below 210-212 reclaim and above 204 protection
rules.trigger_condition: If NVDA breaks below 204, reduce 5 NVDA. If NVDA breaks below 200, reduce another 5 NVDA.
rules.intended_action: hold without adding while preserving 204/200 downside protection
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: broker executable quote and order-detail screenshot required
rules.rule_drift_prevention: Do not add below the reclaim zone.

rules.current_observed_value: GOOG around 361.140; above 355 defense and below 365-370 confirmation
rules.trigger_condition: If GOOG breaks 355, reduce or clean GGLL. If GOOG reaches 365-370 but fails, sell 5 GGLL.
rules.intended_action: keep GGLL as the primary leveraged-risk valve; no GGLL add
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: regular-session executable quote and order-detail screenshot required

rules.current_observed_value: All listed positions remain at 0 shares

rules.execution_evidence_requirement: new decision record required before re-entry
